about: Full-Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, building, and deploying complete web applications from database architecture to pixel-perfect UI. Proficient in component-based architectures using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript. Experienced in backend integration via Node.js, Firebase, and Supabase, alongside automated CI/CD deployment pipelines. Strong background in UI/UX wireframing with Figma and AI-assisted development tools for rapid product delivery.

responsibilities: Developed and maintain the corporate web platform (nwt-llc.com) using React.js, TypeScript, and Firebase.
Built backend infrastructure using Firebase Auth, Firestore, and Hosting; integrated RESTful APIs to automate workflows.
Translated Figma designs into production-ready, mobile-first responsive interfaces using SASS/SCSS.
Automated deployment by configuring CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions and Netlify.
Engineered Bulbee TV (bulbee.tv) video streaming platform using React.js, Hooks, and SASS with mobile-first responsive design.
Developed Bulbee App (bulbee.org) admin dashboard featuring role-based access control (RBAC) and protected routing.
Delivered corporate landing page (dtsltd.org) as a performance-optimized React + TypeScript Single Page Application (SPA).
Delivered 5+ end-to-end web projects as sole developer from UI/UX design to production deployment.
Built Next.js and React.js single page applications (SPA) with TypeScript, SASS, and mobile-first responsive web design.
Developed full-stack WordPress solutions with custom themes, plugin integration, and SEO optimization (advokat-veprytskyi.com, arhzemproekt.kh.ua).
Integrated monday.com API for client workflow automation and project management.
Provided technical support for corporate software, hardware, and network infrastructure.
Automated data tracking and reporting workflows to optimize internal administrative operations.

education.degree: Master’s Degree in Computer Technologies and Network
